user_enumeration.recommendation: Install or configure security plugin to block user enumeration. Add snippet to functions.php: add_filter("rest_endpoints", function($endpoints) { unset($endpoints["/wp/v2/users"]); return $endpoints; });

readme_license.recommendation: Delete or restrict access to readme.html and license.txt via hosting .htaccess or security plugin

security_headers.current: Only HSTS set. Missing: X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, CSP
security_headers.recommendation: Add security headers via wp-config.php or security plugin. HSTS is already configured which is good.

email_auth.dmarc: WEAK - v=DMARC1;p=none (should be p=quarantine or p=reject)
email_auth.recommendation: Strengthen DMARC policy from p=none to p=quarantine after monitoring period

summary.overall: Site is reasonably secure. HSTS and SPF are properly configured. User enumeration exposure is the highest priority fix. SSL is valid for 50+ days.
